headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics sees mixed results in cloud infrastructure pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results in a pilot program create ambiguity regarding the effectiveness and future adoption of the cloud infrastructure initiative.

headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma reports record quarterly revenue, up 25% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 25% is a strong, positive indicator of current business momentum and financial health.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
